question: Implement a simple number guessing game. The program should generate a random number between 1 and 100, and the user has to guess it. Provide hints (higher/lower) after each incorrect guess and count the number of attempts.

test_cases.expected:
Welcome to the Number Guessing Game!
I have generated a random number between 1 and 100.
Can you guess what it is?
Attempt 1: Enter your guess (1-100): Too high! Try a lower number.
Attempt 2: Enter your guess (1-100): Too low! Try a higher number.
Attempt 3: Enter your guess (1-100): Congratulations! You guessed the number 42 in 3 attempts.

Welcome to the Number Guessing Game!
I have generated a random number between 1 and 100.
Can you guess what it is?
Attempt 1: Enter your guess (1-100): Invalid input. Please enter a whole number.
Attempt 1: Enter your guess (1-100): Your guess is out of range. Please guess a number between 1 and 100.
Attempt 1: Enter your guess (1-100): Your guess is out of range. Please guess a number between 1 and 100.
Attempt 1: Enter your guess (1-100): Congratulations! You guessed the number 42 in 1 attempts.

Welcome to the Number Guessing Game!
I have generated a random number between 1 and 100.
Can you guess what it is?
Attempt 1: Enter your guess (1-100): Congratulations! You guessed the number 42 in 1 attempts.
